theme.title: AI Art Theme #1: After Putting On Glasses
theme.homeDescription: Create images about glasses, clearer vision, and new perspectives. Show what changes when a person, animal, object, or place finally sees differently.
notes: This AI image theme starts with a small act of seeing clearly, then asks you to turn that moment into a memorable visual idea.
Putting on glasses can be a real moment: someone finally recognizes a familiar face, reads a sign, or notices details that were always there.
It can also be a visual metaphor. The glasses may stand for a new skill, a method, a mindset, or a way of thinking that makes the same world easier to understand.
The creative question is: who or what puts them on? A person, a cat with glasses, a dog with glasses, an object, or even a city can all become different ways to show clearer vision.
theme.submissionHint: After generating images, you can choose one to submit under today's theme and show everyone your imagination.

recent.title: A City Where the Rain Falls Upward
recent.brief: Gravity breaks in public, and nobody agrees whether it is beautiful or wrong.

recent.title: The Architecture of Loneliness
recent.brief: Use buildings, rooms, or streets to express isolation.

gallery.title: Cat With Glasses
gallery.author: @mira
